title: Set A-axis home offset values on the Visu_MDs screen
summary: This commissioning procedure updates the A-axis Home Offset setting by navigating to the Visu_MDs screen, entering the previously recorded value into the New Value column for each A-axis, and pressing UPDATE to confirm the change.
when_to_use: Use during tipper commissioning when the previously recorded Home Offset value for each A-axis must be entered on the Visu_MDs screen.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to determine or calculate the Home Offset value; this procedure requires a value recorded in a previous procedure.
Do not use this runbook for Z-axis home settings or other commissioning procedures.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the Visu_MDs screen, enter the previously recorded A-axis Home Offset value in the New Value column, and press UPDATE for each applicable A-axis.

safety_notes: This procedure changes commissioning settings for A-axis home offsets.
The source does not provide recovery or escalation steps if the value cannot be entered or confirmed.
access_or_tools_needed: Previously recorded Home Offset value from the previous procedure

system_preconditions: Previously recorded Home Offset value is available for each applicable A-axis.
external_references: Previous procedure where the A-axis Home Offset value was recorded

visual_references.description: Artifact near the A-axis home settings procedure showing or relating to the Visu_MDs screen and A-axis Home Offset update context.
Operator station HMI artifact indicating Visu_MDs is accessed using F2 and that settings changes are made from that screen.

steps.title: Open the Visu_MDs screen
steps.purpose: Access the screen where A-axis Home Offset settings are edited.
steps.instruction: Navigate to the "Visu_MDs" screen using F2.
steps.expected_result: The Visu_MDs screen is displayed and ready for parameter entry.
steps.failure_condition: The Visu_MDs screen does not open or cannot be accessed.

actions.label: Open Visu_MDs
actions.exact_action: Navigate to the "Visu_MDs" screen using F2.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Screen context near the A-axis home settings procedure and the Visu_MDs-related commissioning view.
Operator station HMI reference showing that Visu_MDs is accessed using F2.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Visu_MDs screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.text: Navigate to the "Visu_MDs" screen using F2.
For controller parameters, the user is instructed to navigate on the operator station HMI to the "Visu_MDs" screen using F2.

steps.title: Enter the recorded Home Offset value for an A-axis
steps.purpose: Populate the A-axis Home Offset setting with the previously recorded value.
steps.instruction: For an A-axis, locate the "Home Offset" setting and enter the value recorded in the previous procedure into the "New Value" column.
steps.expected_result: The recorded Home Offset value is entered in the New Value column for the selected A-axis.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct previously recorded value appears in the New Value column for the selected A-axis Home Offset setting.
steps.failure_condition: The Home Offset setting cannot be located, the value is unavailable, or the value cannot be entered in the New Value column.

actions.label: Locate A-axis Home Offset
actions.exact_action: Locate the "Home Offset" setting for an A-axis.

actions.label: Enter recorded value
actions.exact_action: Enter the value recorded in the previous procedure into the "New Value" column.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Area of the Visu_MDs-related screen context associated with A-axis Home Offset entry.

stop_or_escalate_if: The previously recorded Home Offset value is not available.
The Home Offset field for the A-axis cannot be found.
The value cannot be entered into the New Value column.

source_evidence.text: For an A-axis, locate the "Home Offset" setting and enter the value recorded in the previous procedure into the "New Value" column.

Nearby source text instructs the user to navigate to the Visu_MDs screen using F2, enter the previously recorded value for each A-axis Home Offset in the New Value column, and press UPDATE to confirm the change.

steps.title: Update the setting
steps.purpose: Confirm and apply the entered A-axis Home Offset value.
steps.instruction: Press UPDATE to confirm the change.
steps.expected_result: The entered Home Offset value is confirmed on the Visu_MDs screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The change is accepted after UPDATE is pressed.
steps.failure_condition: The change is not accepted or cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Confirm update
actions.exact_action: Press UPDATE to confirm the change.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Visu_MDs-related screen context associated with confirming the Home Offset change.

stop_or_escalate_if: The UPDATE action does not confirm the change.

source_evidence.text: Press UPDATE to confirm the change.

Nearby source text instructs the user to navigate to the Visu_MDs screen using F2, enter the previously recorded value for each A-axis Home Offset in the New Value column, and press UPDATE to confirm the change.

steps.title: Repeat for the other A-axis if needed
steps.purpose: Apply the same Home Offset update process to any other applicable A-axis.
steps.instruction: Repeat the entry and update for the other A-axis if needed.
steps.expected_result: Each applicable A-axis has its previously recorded Home Offset value entered and confirmed.
steps.healthy_condition: All applicable A-axis Home Offset values have been entered and updated.
steps.failure_condition: One or more applicable A-axis values remain unentered or unconfirmed.

actions.label: Repeat for other A-axis
actions.exact_action: Repeat the entry and update for the other A-axis if needed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A-axis home settings context for repeating the same update on the other A-axis.

stop_or_escalate_if: The second applicable A-axis cannot be updated using the same process.

source_evidence.text: Repeat the entry and update for the other A-axis if needed.
Nearby source text instructs the user to enter the previously recorded value for each A-axis Home Offset in the New Value column and press UPDATE to confirm the change.

success_criteria: The previously recorded Home Offset value is entered and confirmed for each applicable A-axis on the Visu_MDs screen.
healthy_conditions: The Visu_MDs screen is accessible using F2.
The previously recorded Home Offset value can be entered in the New Value column.
UPDATE confirms the change for each applicable A-axis.
failure_conditions: The Visu_MDs screen cannot be accessed.
The previously recorded Home Offset value is unavailable.
The Home Offset value cannot be entered in the New Value column.
The change cannot be confirmed with UPDATE.
escalation_guidance: The source does not provide recovery or escalation steps if the value cannot be entered or confirmed.
Escalate for SME review if the required previously recorded Home Offset value is unavailable or the change cannot be confirmed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A-axis home settings context near the Visu_MDs procedure.
Operator station HMI reference showing access to Visu_MDs using F2.
